Container.Name: navicraft
Container.Overview: NaviCraft is an AI-powered playlist generator for Navidrome and Plex/Plexamp. It scans your local music library, builds a metadata index, and uses AI (Claude or Gemini) to generate playlists from free-form text prompts like "chill jazz for a rainy evening" or "high energy workout mix". Supports both Navidrome and Plex as playlist targets — configure one or both. Most settings (servers, AI keys, etc.) can be configured from the Settings gear icon in the web UI after first launch.
Container.Description: NaviCraft - AI-powered playlist generator for Navidrome and Plex/Plexamp. Scans your music library and uses AI to create playlists from natural language prompts.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the NaviCraft web interface

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Path to your music library (same path Navidrome uses). Mounted read-only.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Path for NaviCraft database and persistent data

Config.Name: Navidrome URL
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI. Use container name if on same Docker network, or http://[UNRAID_IP]:4533 for bridge mode.

Config.Name: Navidrome User
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI.

Config.Name: Navidrome Password
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI.

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI.

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI.

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: Optional initial default ('claude' or 'gemini'). Configurable from Settings in the web UI.

Config.Name: Claude API Key
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI.

Config.Name: Claude Model
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI. Default: claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022

Config.Name: Gemini API Key
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI.

Config.Name: Gemini Model
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI. Default: gemini-2.5-flash

Config.Name: Last.fm API Key
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI. Get a free key at https://www.last.fm/api/account/create

Config.Name: Scan Interval (hours)
Config.Description: Optional initial default. Configurable from Settings in the web UI. Default: 6

Config.Name: Scan Extensions
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of audio file extensions to scan

Config.Name: Music Dir (container)
Config.Description: Music directory inside the container (don't change unless you know why)

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container

Config.Name: Max Candidates
Config.Description: Maximum number of candidate songs sent to AI Pass 2
